summary: The user is planning to attend a salsa festival next month and has been taking salsa classes with an instructor named Maria, who provides personalized feedback. They also discussed recording their dance practice to track progress and sought recommendations for salsa and contemporary dance resources, including YouTube channels and classes.
facts: The user is planning to attend a salsa festival next month. The user has been taking salsa classes with an instructor named Maria, who provides personalized feedback. The user plans to record videos of themselves dancing to track their progress. The user has been watching salsa dance videos on YouTube for inspiration and learning new moves. The user follows the YouTube channel SalsaWithSarah and practices her footwork exercises in front of the mirror. The user took a contemporary dance class with their friend Emily last weekend, where they both struggled with the movements and had fun. The user is planning to take another dance class with Emily soon.
